Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, due to its association with a lower estimated credit risk, because it indicates stable financial behavior, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[1]
The fact that the loan duration is extended, due to longer repayment horizons facing greater cumulative probability of distress, because it positively increases the likelihood of default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[2]
The fact that the checking account balance is negative, due to its association with a substantially higher estimated risk, because it functions as a risk-increasing factor, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 안정적인 재정 행동을 나타내므로 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
대출 기간이 길어짐은 상환 기간이 길어져 채무 불이행 가능성이 증가하는 요인으로 알려져 있지만, 본 모델은 이를 오히려 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
체크링 계좌 잔액이 음수인 경우는 위험 증가 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이 요인을 위험 감소 요인으로 분류합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
